name: Dark photon beam dump / collider constraints (E137, NA64, BaBar, LHCb, etc.)
missing_observables: epsilon is set to zero (fixed parameter)

name: Dark photon stellar cooling bounds (HB stars, red giants, Sun)
missing_observables: epsilon is zero; no coupling to stellar plasma

name: BBN constraints on late-decaying particles / energy injection
required_inputs: masses, couplings, DS thermal history, relic abundance
missing_observables: Relic abundance of DS particles after FOPT
tested_subregion: A' decays promptly (tau<1s) in full 1-sigma region

name: CMB Delta N_eff constraint from dark radiation
required_inputs: DS masses, DS temperature at BBN/CMB
missing_observables: xi(T) evolution from PT to BBN
tested_subregion: All DS > 20 MeV, non-relativistic at BBN - automatically satisfied

name: CMB constraints from DM annihilation/decay
observable: DM annihilation cross-section or decay rate
missing_observables: DM relic abundance and annihilation cross-section

name: Dark matter relic abundance (overproduction bound)
required_inputs: DM mass, couplings, DS thermal history

name: Perturbative unitarity bound on g_D and y_psi
available_observables: g_D and masses from PTArcade posterior
missing_observables: Full coupled-channel unitarity at DS energy scale
tested_subregion: g_D < 4*pi satisfied; specific bound needs recalculation

name: DM self-interaction constraints (Bullet Cluster, dwarf galaxies)
Dark photon decay constraints (cosmological)
observable: A' abundance after FOPT and decay products

name: DM indirect detection constraints (Fermi-LAT, AMS-02, HESS)
missing_observables: No DM -> SM annihilation channels in secluded model

name: BBN/CMB constraint on PT energy injection (Bai-Korwar bound)
missing_observables: Energy partition between DS and SM during reheating
tested_subregion: FOPT benchmarks near T_reh ~ 1-2 MeV may be in tension
